description: Компания Samal Software ищет талантливого Аналитика! Мы - молодая компания, которая специализируется на разработке программного обеспечения с внедрением современных технологий. Мы ищем Аналитика в нашу дружную команду: Обязанности: Проведение глубинных интервью и детального обследования бизнес-процессов заказчика, включая выезды на производство; Сбор, анализ и формализация бизнес- и системных требований с заказчиком; Разработка мокапов, прототипов пользовательских интерфейсов и проведение согласований с заказчиком; Подготовка и сопровождение проектной документации (SRS, BRD, User Stories, API-спецификации, UML/DFD/ER-диаграммы и др.); Декомпозиция требований, описание задач для команд backend, frontend и UI/UX-дизайна; Поддержка команды разработки: консультации, контроль реализации требований, участие в приемке; Требования: Опыт работы системным или бизнес аналитиком от 3 лет ; Уверенное владение техниками интервьюирования, анализа требований, обследования процессов предприятий; Практический опыт прототипирования интерфейсов, мокапов (Balsamiq, Figma и пр.); Отличные навыки документирования: SRS, API-спецификации, пользовательские сценарии; Умение моделировать бизнес-процессы (BPMN, UML, DFD); Опыт декомпозиции задач и постановки задач разработке; Знания и практический опыт работы с интеграционными механизмами (REST, SOAP, Kafka, RabbitMQ и др.); Умение писать SQL-запросы для анализа данных; Отличное понимание методологий Agile (Scrum, Kanban, SAFe), а также классических подходов (Waterfall, PMBoK); Опыт координации работы проектной команды и коммуникации с бизнесом; Владение русским и казахским языками; Уверенное владение Jira, Confluence, YouTrack. Условия: Оклад (по результатам собеседования); Пятидневная рабочая неделя. Локация: г. Астана, офис на левом берегу. Работа в команде с сильными разработчиками, аналитиками; Корпоративные праздники, тимбилдинги; Кофе-чай в офисе.

description_html:
Компания Samal Software ищет талантливого Аналитика!

Мы - молодая компания, которая специализируется на разработке программного обеспечения с внедрением современных технологий. Мы ищем Аналитика в нашу дружную команду:

Обязанности:

  • Проведение глубинных интервью и детального обследования бизнес-процессов заказчика, включая выезды на производство;
  • Сбор, анализ и формализация бизнес- и системных требований с заказчиком;
  • Разработка мокапов, прототипов пользовательских интерфейсов и проведение согласований с заказчиком;
  • Подготовка и сопровождение проектной документации (SRS, BRD, User Stories, API-спецификации, UML/DFD/ER-диаграммы и др.);

  • Декомпозиция требований, описание задач для команд backend, frontend и UI/UX-дизайна;

  • Поддержка команды разработки: консультации, контроль реализации требований, участие в приемке;

Требования:

  • Опыт работы системным или бизнес аналитиком от 3 лет;

  • Уверенное владение техниками интервьюирования, анализа требований, обследования процессов предприятий;

  • Практический опыт прототипирования интерфейсов, мокапов (Balsamiq, Figma и пр.);

  • Отличные навыки документирования: SRS, API-спецификации, пользовательские сценарии;

  • Умение моделировать бизнес-процессы (BPMN, UML, DFD);

  • Опыт декомпозиции задач и постановки задач разработке;

  • Знания и практический опыт работы с интеграционными механизмами (REST, SOAP, Kafka, RabbitMQ и др.);

  • Умение писать SQL-запросы для анализа данных;

  • Отличное понимание методологий Agile (Scrum, Kanban, SAFe), а также классических подходов (Waterfall, PMBoK);

  • Опыт координации работы проектной команды и коммуникации с бизнесом;

  • Владение русским и казахским языками;

  • Уверенное владение Jira, Confluence, YouTrack.

Условия:
  • Оклад (по результатам собеседования);
  • Пятидневная рабочая неделя.
  • Локация: г. Астана, офис на левом берегу.
  • Работа в команде с сильными разработчиками, аналитиками;
  • Корпоративные праздники, тимбилдинги;
  • Кофе-чай в офисе.

description_html:
Head of Marketing (управляющая компания)

Формат работы: офис / разъездной
Заработная плата: обсуждается

О компании:

Управляющая компания, объединяющая производственные и сервисные бизнесы (агро, переработка, FMCG и др.).

Основные задачи:

  • Анализ маркетинговых и коммерческих показателей по группе компаний (выручка, маржинальность, ROMI, CAC, LTV)

  • Сбор, консолидация и интерпретация данных из 1С, рекламных кабинетов

  • Подготовка регулярной управленческой отчетности

Разработка и реализация маркетинговой стратегии:

  • Участие в разработке маркетинговой стратегии по направлениям бизнеса

  • Формирование гипотез по росту (каналы, продукты, сегменты, регионы) и их расчет

  • Планирование маркетинговых активностей и бюджетов (медиапланы, прогнозы)

  • Сопровождение запуска маркетинговых кампаний совместно с исполнителями (внутренние команды / подрядчики)

  • Контроль выполнения планов и бюджетов, анализ отклонений

  • Оценка эффективности реализованных активностей и корректировка подходов

Аналитика и контроль:

  • Построение дашбордов и визуализация данных (Power BI / Tableau / Excel / Презентации)

  • Анализ эффективности каналов привлечения и воронки продаж

  • Поиск точек роста и зон потерь в маркетинге и продажах

  • Анализ конкурентной среды и рыночных показателей

Требования:

  • Опыт работы маркетологом-аналитиком / бизнес-аналитиком или BDM от 2–3 лет

  • Опыт участия в разработке и реализации маркетинговых активностей

  • Уверенное владение Excel и BI-инструментами, подготовкой презентационных материалов

  • Понимание маркетинговых метрик и юнит-экономики

  • Опыт работы с данными из разных систем

  • Сильные аналитические навыки и системное мышление

Мы предлагаем:

  • Работа на уровне управляющей компании

  • Влияние на маркетинг нескольких бизнес-направлений

  • Конкурентный доход + бонусы

  • Возможность профессионального роста

title: System Analyst

In this role, you will define the product vision, manage requirements, and collaborate closely with de velo pment teams to deliver high-quality solutions. Requirements: 2+ years of experience as a Product Owner or Business Analyst Strong technical background and understanding of system architecture Excell ent command of spoken and written English Deep knowledge of soft wa re de velo pment lifecycle (SDLC) and Agile methodologies Experience in defining product vision, roadmap management, and backlog prioritization Proficiency in gathering, documenting, and managing requirements throughout the lifecycle Ability to create clear specifications, including UML/BPMN diagrams and UI layouts Hands-on experience with system integrations (REST API, message brokers) Strong stakeholder management, risk mitigation, and problem-solving skills Nice to Have: Agile methodology certification Experience with Jira and Confluence Basic knowledge of SQL We can offer: Projects for such clients as PayPal, Wa rgaming, Xerox, Philips, adidas and Toyota Competitive compensation that depends on your qualification and skills Career de velo pment system with clear skill qualifications Flexible working hours aligned to your schedule Options to work remotely Compensation of medical costs English courses online Corporate parties and events for employees and their children Internal conferences, workshops and meetups for learning and experience sharing Gym membership compensation, corporate sport competitions (cybersport included) 5 days of paid sick leave per year with no obligation to submit a sick-leave certificate
key_skills_text: Business English, Agile, SDLC, UML, BPMN
description_html:
We are looking for a professional with a strong technical background to drive product development and align business goals with technical capabilities. In this role, you will define the product vision, manage requirements, and collaborate closely with development teams to deliver high-quality solutions.

Requirements:

  • 2+ years of experience as a Product Owner or Business Analyst
  • Strong technical background and understanding of system architecture
  • Excellent command of spoken and written English
  • Deep knowledge of software development lifecycle (SDLC) and Agile methodologies
  • Experience in defining product vision, roadmap management, and backlog prioritization
  • Proficiency in gathering, documenting, and managing requirements throughout the lifecycle
  • Ability to create clear specifications, including UML/BPMN diagrams and UI layouts
  • Hands-on experience with system integrations (REST API, message brokers)
  • Strong stakeholder management, risk mitigation, and problem-solving skills

Nice to Have:

  • Agile methodology certification
  • Experience with Jira and Confluence
  • Basic knowledge of SQL

We can offer:

  • Projects for such clients as PayPal, Wargaming, Xerox, Philips, adidas and Toyota
  • Competitive compensation that depends on your qualification and skills
  • Career development system with clear skill qualifications
  • Flexible working hours aligned to your schedule
  • Options to work remotely
  • Compensation of medical costs
  • English courses online
  • Corporate parties and events for employees and their children
  • Internal conferences, workshops and meetups for learning and experience sharing
  • Gym membership compensation, corporate sport competitions (cybersport included)
  • 5 days of paid sick leave per year with no obligation to submit a sick-leave certificate

title: Team Lead DWH (Руководитель проектов Департамента сводной отчётности и ЕХД)
requirement: ...области информационных технологий, инженерии, математики, экономики, финансов, управления данными, бизнес - аналитики или других смежных направлений. Требования к стажу/опыту работы...
responsibility: Витрины данных под управленческую и регуляторную отчётность. Разработка архитектуры слоёв (stage / core / mart). Управление историчностью данных (SCD). Контроль качества и...
description: Требования к образованию (уровень, профиль и др.): Высшее образование в области информационных технологий, инженерии, математики, экономики, финансов, управления данными, бизнес-аналитики или других смежных направлений. Требования к стажу/опыту работы: Не менее 4-х лет опыта работы в сфере анализа данных, управления данными или бизнес-аналитики, в коммерческих и некоммерческих организациях. Не менее 2-х лет в качестве руководителя структурного подразделения, тимлида команды или проектного руководителя в области анализа данных в коммерческих и некоммерческих организациях. Знания и умения, необходимые для исполнения должностных обязанностей: Уверенное владение SQL на уровне сложных запросов, оптимизации, оконных функций, CTE. Практический опыт проектирования моделей данных: star / snowflake schema; нормализованные и денормализованные структуры; витрины данных под управленческую и регуляторную отчётность. Опыт построения и сопровождения корпоративного хранилища данных (ЕХД): разработка архитектуры слоёв (stage / core / mart); управление историчностью данных (SCD); контроль качества и целостности данных. Опыт интеграции данных из различных источников: 1С; реляционные БД (PostgreSQL, MS SQL или аналоги); файлы Excel / CSV; внешние источники данных. Опыт построения ETL / ELT-процессов и автоматизации загрузок данных. Понимание принципов производительности БД и оптимизации: индексация; партиционирование; управление нагрузкой и расписаниями. Опыт работы с BI-инструментами (Qlik Sense, Power BI, Tableau или аналоги) на уровне подготовки данных и витрин. Понимание принципов информационной безопасности и разграничения доступа к данным.

description: Обязанности: ведение документации бизнес-процессов (система управления процессами, KPI, реестр и схемы, ВНД); мониторинг и анализ текущего состояния бизнес-процессов, оценка зрелости бизнес-процессов; моделирование и проектирование новых или изменение (оптимизация) текущих бизнес-процессов; координация работы по внедрению бизнес-процессов в операционную деятельность, мониторинг и контроль их исполнения в соответствии с ВНД, анализ и оценка эффективности и результативности бизнес-процессов; разработка и рекомендаций и предложений по оптимизации или реинжинирингу бизнес-процессов, в том числе по их автоматизации и цифровизации, на основе получаемых данных о бизнес-процессах Консультирование, обучение, методологическая поддержка и сопровождение бизнес-процессов по вопросам процессного подхода и процессного управления, внедрение инструментов процессного управления.   • ведение документации бизнес-процессов (система управления процессами, KPI, реестр и схемы, ВНД);
  • мониторинг и анализ текущего состояния бизнес-процессов, оценка зрелости бизнес-процессов;
  • моделирование и проектирование новых или изменение (оптимизация) текущих бизнес-процессов;
  • координация работы по внедрению бизнес-процессов в операционную деятельность, мониторинг и контроль их исполнения в соответствии с ВНД, анализ и оценка эффективности и результативности бизнес-процессов;
  • разработка и рекомендаций и предложений по оптимизации или реинжинирингу бизнес-процессов, в том числе по их автоматизации и цифровизации, на основе получаемых данных о бизнес-процессах
  • Консультирование, обучение, методологическая поддержка и сопровождение бизнес-процессов по вопросам процессного подхода и процессного управления, внедрение инструментов процессного управления.
Требования:
  • Высшее образование
  • дополнительным преимуществом будут курсы (сертификаты) по СМК или BPM
  • Владение методологией процессного подхода, методологией управления бизнес-процессами (цикл PDCA/OPDCA/SDCA); умение работать с нотациями BPMN и IDEFO; понимание природы и предназначения контрольных функций;
  • знание методологии оценки операционных рисков; проектное управление (классические и гибкие методы управления)
  • Опыт работы с ERP и/или BI-дашбордами
Условия:
  • Официальное трудоустройство
  • Стабильная заработная плата
  • График работы: 5/2.
  • Комфортный офис
  • Возможность профессионального развития

description: АО «Национальные информационные технологии» — мы создаём цифровое государство будущего, делая технологии ближе к людям и помогая Казахстану становиться умнее, быстрее и современнее. Работа АО «НИТ» напрямую влияет на жизнь каждого гражданина: через наши информационные системы ежедневно проходят миллионы транзакций и запросов к государственным услугам. Требования: умение работать с документацией (ФЭМ, ТЗ, ТЧ, спецификации); навыки работы с системами электронного документооборота и базовыми ИТ-инструментами (Excel, PowerPoint, Confluence, Jira); умение работать с документацией (ФЭМ, ТЗ, ТЧ, спецификации); навыки работы с системами электронного документооборота и базовыми ИТ-инструментами (Excel, PowerPoint, Confluence, Jira). Обязанности: сопровождение интегрированной информационной системы ЦОН в рамках договорных обязательств; обработка заявок поступающих от пользователей; своевременная и качественная отработка, исполнение поступающих на АС «Service Desk». Мы предлагаем: обучение и развитие — курсы и повышение квалификации, включая государственные программы (Tech Orda); лечебное пособие — выплата в размере двух окладов к ежегодному отпуску; материальную поддержку — помощь при рождении ребёнка, свадьбе, лечении и других значимых событиях; современный офис — комфортное рабочее пространство в IT-центре на ЭКСПО; корпоративную развозку — утренние и вечерние маршруты по всем районам города; удобный график работы — с 08:00 до 17:30; финансовую стабильность — аванс в середине месяца; премирование — по итогам года и к праздничным датам; возможность предоставления жилья — в исключительных случаях; карьерный рост — повышение заработной платы и должности при успешных результатах работы; развитую корпоративную культуру — командные мероприятия и внутренние активности; масштабные проекты — участие в государственных и международных IT-инициативах; современные технологии — работа с актуальными решениями и обмен опытом с сильной командой специалистов. 🚀 Готовы стать частью команды, создающей цифровое будущее Казахстана? Оставляйте отклик — мы внимательно рассмотрим ваше резюме.

title: Corporate Lawyer
requirement: The minimum English level required is B2 (Upper Intermediate).
responsibility: Advising on intellectual property, data protection (including GDPR), and international cooperation initiatives. Maintaining legal records and contract registers, and providing...
description: IMPORTANT! The minimum English level required is B2 (Upper Intermediate). Please submit your CV in English — applications in other languages will not be reviewed! About Us: Coventry University, founded in 1843, is a forward-looking, modern institution with a proud tradition of providing high-quality education. Students benefit from state-of-the-art equipment and facilities across various academic disciplines, including business, computing, health, design, engineering, and performing arts. Coventry University has been described by Times Higher Education as “one of the most innovative modern universities, bold in its vision of the 21st-century student experience”. Job Description: At Coventry University Kazakhstan, the Legal Specialist plays a crucial role in ensuring the university’s compliance with local and international legal frameworks. This role involves providing legal support, drafting and implementing policies and regulatory documents, and handling licensing and permit-related matters. The Legal Specialist will advise on a broad range of legal issues, including employment law, contracts, regulatory compliance, and institutional governance, ensuring the university operates within the legal and ethical standards of both Kazakhstan and the UK. Key Responsibilities: Drafting, reviewing, and approving civil-law contracts and the University’s internal regulatory documents; Monitoring legislative changes in the Republic of Kazakhstan and advising management on legal implications; Providing legal advice, opinions, and analytical support on matters related to the University’s operations; Supporting corporate governance processes, including organizing meetings of governing bodies and preparing related documentation; Managing pre-trial dispute resolution and representing the University in litigation, mediation, and before state authorities; Ensuring legal compliance in employment matters, including disciplinary actions and terminations; Supporting inspections by regulatory authorities and handling administrative proceedings; Assisting with amendments to corporate documents and transactions related to partnership interests; Supporting licensing, accreditation, and regulatory compliance processes in Kazakhstan and internationally (including UK standards); Advising on intellectual property, data protection (including GDPR), and international cooperation initiatives; Maintaining legal records and contract registers, and providing legal support to University staff as required.
key_skills_text: Английский язык, Юридический английский, Минимизация правовых рисков, Представительство в государственных органах, Мониторинг законодательства
description_html:
IMPORTANT!
The minimum English level required is B2 (Upper Intermediate).
Please submit your CV in English — applications in other languages will not be reviewed!

About Us: 

Coventry University, founded in 1843, is a forward-looking, modern institution with a proud tradition of providing high-quality education. Students benefit from state-of-the-art equipment and facilities across various academic disciplines, including business, computing, health, design, engineering, and performing arts. Coventry University has been described by Times Higher Education as “one of the most innovative modern universities, bold in its vision of the 21st-century student experience”.

Job Description: At Coventry University Kazakhstan, the Legal Specialist plays a crucial role in ensuring the university’s compliance with local and international legal frameworks. This role involves providing legal support, drafting and implementing policies and regulatory documents, and handling licensing and permit-related matters. The Legal Specialist will advise on a broad range of legal issues, including employment law, contracts, regulatory compliance, and institutional governance, ensuring the university operates within the legal and ethical standards of both Kazakhstan and the UK.

Key Responsibilities:

Drafting, reviewing, and approving civil-law contracts and the University’s internal regulatory documents;

  • Monitoring legislative changes in the Republic of Kazakhstan and advising management on legal implications;
  • Providing legal advice, opinions, and analytical support on matters related to the University’s operations;
  • Supporting corporate governance processes, including organizing meetings of governing bodies and preparing related documentation;
  • Managing pre-trial dispute resolution and representing the University in litigation, mediation, and before state authorities;
  • Ensuring legal compliance in employment matters, including disciplinary actions and terminations;
  • Supporting inspections by regulatory authorities and handling administrative proceedings;
  • Assisting with amendments to corporate documents and transactions related to partnership interests;
  • Supporting licensing, accreditation, and regulatory compliance processes in Kazakhstan and internationally (including UK standards);
  • Advising on intellectual property, data protection (including GDPR), and international cooperation initiatives;
  • Maintaining legal records and contract registers, and providing legal support to University staff as required.

description: Job Description: The business area of Rock Processing, part of Sandvik Group, is an industrial frontrunner in screening and crushing equipment for mining and construction. We create productivity driven by technology and our solutions are engineered to deliver the highest performance and automation level in mines, quarries and civil engineering projects. We are now looking for a structured and adaptable Sales Professional, Central Asia, Turkiye , including other CIS countries, focusing on Rock processing solitions located in Kazakhstan to strengthen and grow our screening and crushing business within respected Territory. As a Sales Professional you will be part of South Europe, Middle East & CIS Sales Area, with direct business reporting to Territory manager Central Asia& Turkiye. You will be travel extensively in Central Asia, Turkiye and CIS countries up to 70%. Key responsibilities: You will have overall responsibility for developing the screening equipment business , including distributor capability building, customer engagement, and sales performance management in the region. You will work closely with customers across Territory to expand Rock processing screening equipment footprint , ensuring that solutions are aligned with customer process requirements and performance targets. You will collaborate with cross‑functional teams to drive sustainable growth and long‑term customer Build deep technical and application knowledge of SRP screening equipment , including customer processes, material characteristics, and operational challenges, to position the right solutions for each application. Develop sales channels for screening solutions together with distributors, including planning and execution of distributor training programs focused on screening technology, application know‑how, and value selling. Prepare and deliver sales and technical presentations highlighting SRP screening equipment, services, and digital solutions, clearly linking product features to customer productivity and uptime improvements Manage regular customer visits, build strong professional relationships at all levels, and act as a trusted advisor on screening process optimization and lifecycle solutions. Analyse the existing customer portfolio to improve screening equipment performance and aftermarket potential , while identifying new screening opportunities that create added value for both customers and Sandvik Ensure full compliance with Sandvik safety standards , local regulations, and internal procedures, including incident reporting and legal requirements relevant to screening equipment installations and operations. Solid understanding of commercial terms, contracts, and sales processes in capital equipment and aftermarket business. Fluent in Russian and English ; Turkish and Kazakh languages skills are considered an advantage. Strong proficiency in MS Office ; experience with Power BI and Salesforce is a plus. description_html:
Job Description:

The business area of Rock Processing, part of Sandvik Group, is an industrial frontrunner in screening and crushing equipment for mining and construction. We create productivity driven by technology and our solutions are engineered to deliver the highest performance and automation level in mines, quarries and civil engineering projects.

We are now looking for a structured and adaptable Sales Professional, Central Asia, Turkiye, including other CIS countries, focusing on Rock processing solitions located in Kazakhstan to strengthen and grow our screening and crushing business within respected Territory.

As a Sales Professional you will be part of South Europe, Middle East & CIS Sales Area, with direct business reporting to Territory manager Central Asia& Turkiye. You will be travel extensively in Central Asia, Turkiye and CIS countries up to 70%.

Key responsibilities:

You will have overall responsibility for developing the screening equipment business, including distributor capability building, customer engagement, and sales performance management in the region. You will work closely with customers across Territory to expand Rock processing screening equipment footprint, ensuring that solutions are aligned with customer process requirements and performance targets. You will collaborate with cross‑functional teams to drive sustainable growth and long‑term customer

Build deep technical and application knowledge of SRP screening equipment, including customer processes, material characteristics, and operational challenges, to position the right solutions for each application.

Develop sales channels for screening solutions together with distributors, including planning and execution of distributor training programs focused on screening technology, application know‑how, and value selling.

Prepare and deliver sales and technical presentations highlighting SRP screening equipment, services, and digital solutions, clearly linking product features to customer productivity and uptime improvements

Manage regular customer visits, build strong professional relationships at all levels, and act as a trusted advisor on screening process optimization and lifecycle solutions.

Analyse the existing customer portfolio to improve screening equipment performance and aftermarket potential, while identifying new screening opportunities that create added value for both customers and Sandvik

Ensure full compliance with Sandvik safety standards, local regulations, and internal procedures, including incident reporting and legal requirements relevant to screening equipment installations and operations.

Qualifications

University degree in Mechanical Engineering, Metallurgy, or a related technical field, or equivalent industry experience.
7–10 years of experience in sales, service, or project management within a multinational environment, preferably involving screening and crushing equipment, mineral processing, or related technologies.
Solid understanding of commercial terms, contracts, and sales processes in capital equipment and aftermarket business.
Fluent in Russian and English; Turkish and Kazakh languages skills are considered an advantage.
Strong proficiency in MS Office; experience with Power BI and Salesforce is a plus.
Strong analytical, planning, and negotiation skills, with the ability to translate screening performance data into clear commercial and technical value propositions

title: Senior Data Engineer
requirement: 6+ лет опыта в Data Engineering . Опыт построения production-grade data -платформ. Сильные знания SQL и распределённых систем.
responsibility: Проектирование и развитие ETL / ELT архитектуры. Нормализация, дедупликация и корреляция данных. Построение streaming pipelines для real-time enrichment и scoring.
description: Обязанности: Проектирование и развитие ETL / ELT архитектуры; Нормализация, дедупликация и корреляция данных; Построение streaming pipelines для real-time enrichment и scoring; Поддержка Entity Resolution / Identity Resolution; Работа с шумными, неполными и противоречивыми данными; Реализация replay / backfill без потери консистентности; Требования: 6+ лет опыта в Data Engineering; Опыт построения production-grade data-платформ; Сильные знания SQL и распределённых систем; Будет большим плюсом ( Graph processing (Neo4j, JanusGraph, Gremlin) ML / scoring pipelines). Условия: Английский и Казахский языки: бесплатно и удобно, прямо внутри компании; Заботимся о форме и здоровье: компенсируем фитнес и медицинские услуги; Мы за активный отдых: футбол, баскетбол, яркие летний и зимний корпоративы; Корпоративная библиотека для поиска идей и решения рабочих задач; Настольный теннис в офисе для коротких перерывов и заряда энергией.

description: The Arlo firmware team has an immediate opening for a Senior Embedded Firmware Engineer. You are expected to be an expert in streaming video in a challenging channel environment. In this role, you will be part of a team that implements everything from RTOS to device drivers and applications, communications protocols, test features in Arlo’s Video and Internet of Things devices. You must thrive in a fast-paced environment. Your contributions will make a pronounced difference to future embedded products. Required skills: Engineering experience, at least 5 years Effective communication Experience hiring engineers Embedded C and C++ Real Time Operating Systems (RTOS) (Linux mandatory, Desirable, FreeRTOS, Threadx) Hard real time application experience: eg Video, Audio, Signal Processing, Audio/Video codec experience a plus Device driver design and implementation Optimizing embedded software for size and speed Optimizing boot loaders, eg uboot. Debugging and testing embedded systems Multitasking/multithreaded programming Streaming both Video and Audio in both Linux and RTOS. Networking Protocols: TCP/FTP/UDP/RTP/RTSP/RTCP/HTTPS/MQTT, Desirable: WebRTC, SIP, Thread, Matter Wireless communication protocols: WiFi, BLE, NFC, LTE Basic electronics test equipment (oscilloscopes, function generators, logic analyzer, etc.) English: upper-intermediate Beneficial Skills Video and video networking experience a plus BS CS/EE/CE or relevant work experience (MS is a plus) Responsibilities Bring up new SoCs, chipsets, sensors, and products Write, debug, and integrate new device drivers, protocols, RTOS and other firmware code across Arlo’s embedded product line Interacting with Hardware, Cloud Operations Team, Mobile Clients Team and various other cross-functional teams throughout Arlo Review board schematics and data sheets Enable test strategies for new components in upcoming products Support product development builds Lead assigned feature development Conditions: Salary in US dollars. Medical insurance and coverage of sports activities. Remote job at international project. Great team and colleagues. Knowledge sharing. Corporate culture with people-oriented approach.
description_html:
The Arlo firmware team has an immediate opening for a Senior Embedded Firmware Engineer. You are expected to be an expert in streaming video in a challenging channel environment. In this role, you will be part of a team that implements everything from RTOS to device drivers and applications, communications protocols, test features in Arlo’s Video and Internet of Things devices. You must thrive in a fast-paced environment. Your contributions will make a pronounced difference to future embedded products.

Required skills:

  • Engineering experience, at least 5 years
  • Effective communication
  • Experience hiring engineers
  • Embedded C and C++
  • Real Time Operating Systems (RTOS) (Linux mandatory, Desirable, FreeRTOS, Threadx)
  • Hard real time application experience: eg Video, Audio, Signal Processing, Audio/Video codec experience a plus
  • Device driver design and implementation
  • Optimizing embedded software for size and speed
  • Optimizing boot loaders, eg uboot.
  • Debugging and testing embedded systems
  • Multitasking/multithreaded programming
  • Streaming both Video and Audio in both Linux and RTOS.
  • Networking Protocols: TCP/FTP/UDP/RTP/RTSP/RTCP/HTTPS/MQTT, Desirable: WebRTC, SIP, Thread, Matter
  • Wireless communication protocols: WiFi, BLE, NFC, LTE
  • Basic electronics test equipment (oscilloscopes, function generators, logic analyzer, etc.)
  • English: upper-intermediate

Beneficial  Skills

  • Video and video networking experience a plus
  • BS CS/EE/CE or relevant work experience (MS is a plus)

Responsibilities

  • Bring up new SoCs, chipsets, sensors, and products
  • Write, debug, and integrate new device drivers, protocols, RTOS and other firmware code across Arlo’s embedded product line
  • Interacting with Hardware, Cloud Operations Team, Mobile Clients Team and various other cross-functional teams throughout Arlo
  • Review board schematics and data sheets
  • Enable test strategies for new components in upcoming products
  • Support product development builds
  • Lead assigned feature development

Conditions:

  • Salary in US dollars.
  • Medical insurance and coverage of sports activities.
  • Remote job at international project.
  • Great team and colleagues.
  • Knowledge sharing.
  • Corporate culture with people-oriented approach.

description: How will you make a difference? As a member of the Manufacturing Quality organization, you will provide shop‑floor quality leadership to support day‑to‑day production activities at the LKZ plant. You will be responsible for ensuring compliance with Quality Management System (QMS) requirements, leading problem resolution for quality issues, and supporting quality readiness for process changes. This role directly supports Manufacturing and Engineering by preventing defects, improving quality KPIs, and promoting a strong quality and product safety culture. You will report quality performance, issues, and improvement actions to site quality and manufacturing leadership on a regular basis. What do we want to know about you? Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Quality, or a related field Minimum 3 years of experience in Quality, Manufacturing, or Engineering Experience working in a production or shop‑floor environment Strong problem‑solving, communication, and collaboration skills Experience with assembly, welding, electrical, or test processes Ability to read and interpret drawings, specifications, and work instructions Familiarity with quality systems and manufacturing KPIs (DPU, defects, audits, quality issues) Experience using quality tools, audits, or continuous improvement methodologies Basic data analysis skills (Excel or similar tools) What will your typical day look like? Act as the primary quality contact for assigned manufacturing areas Provide hands‑on quality support on the shop floor Lead containment actions, root‑cause analysis, and corrective actions for quality issues Support compliance with Quality Management System (QMS) requirements Monitor, analyze, and improve quality KPIs such as DPU, defects, audit results, and quality issues Work closely with Manufacturing, Engineering, and Test teams to prevent defects and improve processes Support PPAP, FAI, and quality readiness activities for new or changed manufacturing processes Promote a strong quality mindset and product safety culture among production teams Participate in audits, reviews, and continuous improvement initiatives
description_html:
How will you make a difference?

As a member of the Manufacturing Quality organization, you will provide shop‑floor quality leadership to support day‑to‑day production activities at the LKZ plant. You will be responsible for ensuring compliance with Quality Management System (QMS) requirements, leading problem resolution for quality issues, and supporting quality readiness for process changes. This role directly supports Manufacturing and Engineering by preventing defects, improving quality KPIs, and promoting a strong quality and product safety culture. You will report quality performance, issues, and improvement actions to site quality and manufacturing leadership on a regular basis.

What do we want to know about you?

  • Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Quality, or a related field
  • Minimum 3 years of experience in Quality, Manufacturing, or Engineering
  • Experience working in a production or shop‑floor environment
  • Strong problem‑solving, communication, and collaboration skills
  • Experience with assembly, welding, electrical, or test processes
  • Ability to read and interpret drawings, specifications, and work instructions
  • Familiarity with quality systems and manufacturing KPIs (DPU, defects, audits, quality issues)
  • Experience using quality tools, audits, or continuous improvement methodologies
  • Basic data analysis skills (Excel or similar tools)

What will your typical day look like?

  • Act as the primary quality contact for assigned manufacturing areas
  • Provide hands‑on quality support on the shop floor
  • Lead containment actions, root‑cause analysis, and corrective actions for quality issues
  • Support compliance with Quality Management System (QMS) requirements
  • Monitor, analyze, and improve quality KPIs such as DPU, defects, audit results, and quality issues
  • Work closely with Manufacturing, Engineering, and Test teams to prevent defects and improve processes
  • Support PPAP, FAI, and quality readiness activities for new or changed manufacturing processes
  • Promote a strong quality mindset and product safety culture among production teams
  • Participate in audits, reviews, and continuous improvement initiatives

requirement: Experience in DevOps for 3+ years, preferably in data and analytics platforms. Experience with infrastructure and CI/CD tools...
responsibility: ... data retention and archiving policies in compliance with regulatory requirements. Monitoring security and auditing all data operations. Integrating with Data ...
description: Andersen is hiring a DevOps Engineer for a project building a centralized Data Warehouse, ensuring automated reporting, improved data quality, and secure, scalable data processing. The customer is one of the most reliable financial institutions in Kazakhstan. It offers a full range of financial services for both individual and corporate clients, including business lending, mortgages, consumer loans, deposits, payment services, and digital banking solutions. The company focuses on reliability, innovation, and sustainable growth, helping clients achieve their financial goals and contributing to the country’s economic development. The project is focused on building a centralized Data Warehouse as a single source of truth for regulatory and internal reporting. It aims to automate reporting processes, improve data quality, reduce load on operational systems, and ensure secure, scalable data processing with modern infrastructure and CI/CD practices. Responsibilities: Setting up CI/CD processes to automate deployment and testing. Maintaining infrastructure and system monitoring. Ensuring system security and stability. Implementing data encryption (at rest and in transit) to protect confidentiality. Applying PII masking and anonymization to meet security standards. Implementing RBAC to manage access and control user permissions at the object level. Defining data retention and archiving policies in compliance with regulatory requirements. Monitoring security and auditing all data operations. Integrating with Data Loss Prevention (DLP) systems. Ensuring high availability and fault tolerance for critical services. Providing scalability for handling large volumes of data. Implementing CI/CD pipelines for automated deployments. Monitoring performance using Prometheus and Grafana. Developing disaster recovery procedures. Conducting system resilience and failover testing. Must-haves: Experience in DevOps for 3+ years, preferably in data and analytics platforms. Experience with infrastructure and CI/CD tools (GitLab CI, Jenkins). Knowledge of cloud technologies, Docker, and Kubernetes. Experience with monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana). Strong communication and analytical skills. Level of English – from Intermediate and above. Nice-to-haves: Experience working with cloud platforms (AWS/Azure). Reasons why this job would be interesting to you: Experience in teamwork with leaders in FinTech, Healthcare, Retail, Telecom, and others. Andersen cooperates with such businesses as Samsung, Siemens, Johnson & Johnson, BNP Paribas, Ryanair, Mercedes, TUI, Verivox, Allianz, T-Systems, etc.. The opportunity to change the project and/or develop expertise in an interesting business domain. Job conditions – you can work both fully remotely and from the office or can choose a hybrid variant. Guarantee of professional, financial, and career growth! The company has introduced systems of mentoring and adaptation for each new employee. The opportunity to earn up to an additional 1,000 USD per month, depending on the level of expertise, which will be included in the annual bonus, by participating in the company's activities. Access to the corporate training portal, where the entire knowledge base of the company is collected and which is constantly updated. Bright corporate life (parties / pizza days / PlayStation / fruits / coffee / snacks / movies). Certification compensation (AWS, PMP, etc). Referral program. English courses. Private health insurance and compensation for sports activities. Your personal data is protected in accordance with GDPR regulations. Join us!

We are looking for an Avionics Engineer to manage the complex electrical and electronic systems of our fleet, ensuring our flight decks are always state-of-the-art. Responsibilities : Manage avionics modifications, software updates (LSAPs), and navigation database cycles. description: At Alstom, we understand transport networks and what moves people. description_html:
At Alstom, we understand transport networks and what moves people. From high-speed trains, metros, monorails, and trams, to turnkey systems, services, infrastructure, signalling, and digital mobility, we offer our diverse customers the broadest portfolio in the industry. Every day, 80,000 colleagues lead the way to greener and smarter mobility worldwide, connecting cities as we reduce carbon and replace cars.

Could you be the full-time Indirect Buyer in Astana we’re looking for?


Your future role

Take on a new challenge and apply your procurement expertise in a dynamic and innovative field. You’ll work alongside collaborative and forward-thinking teammates.

You'll play a key role in ensuring seamless procurement processes, contributing to the efficiency and success of our operations. Day-to-day, you’ll work closely with teams across the business, including supply chain, contract management, and operational departments, to align procurement strategies, manage supplier relationships, and much more.

You’ll specifically take care of managing end-to-end procurement processes for indirect materials and services, but also drive cost-saving initiatives and process optimization projects.

We’ll look to you for:

  • Managing procurement processes, including planning, demand forecasting, supplier evaluation, and contract execution.

  • Consolidating needs and ensuring alignment with internal stakeholders.

  • Conducting market research and identifying competitive suppliers.

  • Organizing and executing RFQ/RFP processes, evaluating bids, and preparing comparative analyses.

  • Negotiating commercial and contractual conditions to achieve cost-effective and reliable procurement.

  • Preparing, reviewing, and coordinating contracts and addendums with Legal and internal functions.

  • Monitoring supplier performance, resolving operational problems, and managing claims.

  • Ensuring the timely delivery of goods and services in line with agreed schedules and service levels.

  • Maintaining accurate procurement data and documentation in SAP/Ariba.

  • Participating in cost-saving initiatives and process optimization projects.

  • Ensuring full compliance with internal procurement policies, ethical standards, and corporate guidelines.


All about you

We value passion and attitude over experience. That’s why we don’t expect you to have every single skill. Instead, we’ve listed some that we think will help you succeed and grow in this role:

  • A university degree in Engineering, Economics, Business, Supply Chain, or related fields.

  • At least 3 years of experience in procurement or similar roles (e.g., supply chain, contract management, operational procurement).

  • Strong understanding of procurement processes, including planning, demand forecasting, supplier evaluation, and contract management.

  • Proven experience in supplier relationship management, including contract handling, issue resolution, claim management, negotiation, and monitoring of contractual obligations.

  • Strong negotiation and communication skills.

  • English proficiency at an intermediate level or higher (advanced English is an advantage).

  • Practical experience with ERP systems (preferably SAP, Ariba).


Things you’ll enjoy

Join us on a life-long transformative journey – the rail industry is here to stay, so you can grow and develop new skills and experiences throughout your career. You’ll also:

  • Enjoy stability, challenges, and a long-term career free from boring daily routines

  • Work with advanced procurement strategies for global projects

  • Collaborate with supportive and innovative colleagues

  • Contribute to impactful and sustainable projects

  • Utilize our flexible and inclusive working environment

  • Steer your career in whatever direction you choose across functions and countries

  • Benefit from our investment in your development, through award-winning learning

  • Progress towards leadership roles or specialized expertise

  • Benefit from a fair and dynamic reward package that recognizes your performance and potential, plus comprehensive and competitive social coverage (life, medical, pension)

  • Thrive with our quality-of-life perks including corporate shuttlebus, 1fit discount, and well-being service subscription (EMPATHY).

You don’t need to be a train enthusiast to thrive with us. We guarantee that when you step onto one of our trains with your friends or family, you’ll be proud. If you’re up for the challenge, we’d love to hear from you!


Important to note

As a global business, we’re an equal-opportunity employer that celebrates diversity across the 63 countries we operate in. We’re committed to creating an inclusive workplace for everyone.

key_skills_text: SQL, Английский язык, Аналитическое мышление, Analytical skills, Analysis, Reconciliation
description_html:
Dwelly builds financial and operational infrastructure for modern property management. The platform helps operators handle payments, reporting, and financial workflows at scale — reliably, transparently, and with strong auditability.

You’ll join a small, high-ownership team working at the intersection of finance, product, and operations, solving real money-impact problems daily.


Why this role is opened

Dwelly is scaling its payments and financial operations. As volume grows, so does complexity: collections, payouts, reconciliations, refunds, balances, and edge-case failures.

This role exists to own the operational backbone of payments — making sure money moves correctly, issues are investigated fast, and repeat problems turn into scalable processes and tooling.

You’ll sit within the Payments team and work closely with Finance, Product, and Engineering.


It would be great if you’re able to align with GMT working hours with minimal adjustment.

What you’ll do

Payments & incident investigation

  • Investigate payment-related issues (reconciliation gaps, payout errors, missing funds, vendor discrepancies)

  • Identify root causes and drive resolution across finance, product, and engineering

  • Communicate clearly on incidents, escalations, and outcomes


Operational support & scaling

  • Support finance team with technical/product questions and ad-hoc tasks

  • Convert repeat issues into SOPs, checklists, and structured workflows

  • Improve operational reliability and reduce manual firefighting


Process & tooling improvement

  • Analyse operational processes and propose improvements

  • Help design internal dashboards and operational tooling

  • Work with messy exports and data sources to build clean reconciliation flows

Must-have

Analytical & operational mindset

  • Strong root-cause thinking: you can investigate and resolve complex issues

  • High attention to detail where mistakes have financial or audit impact

  • Ability to prioritize and manage multiple operational cases

Finance & data

  • Understanding of core accounting principles (reconciliation, balances, ledgers)

  • SQL (comfortable querying production/financial datasets)

  • Strong spreadsheet skills (pivots, lookups, reconciliation workflows)

  • Comfortable working with imperfect or messy data exports

Communication

  • Clear, concise written communication

  • Ability to produce structured updates, incident summaries, and escalations

  • Comfortable working cross-functionally with finance and engineering

Nice to have

  • Experience in financial operations / accounting systems

  • Background in implementation consulting, technical support, or solutions engineering

  • Experience with APIs or technical product environments

  • Familiarity with UK payments ecosystem or compliance expectations

Who will thrive here

Someone who:

  • enjoys solving messy operational problems

  • cares about accuracy and auditability

  • likes turning chaos into structure

  • can sit between finance and product without getting lost

  • wants ownership over real money-impact processes

Why join

  • High ownership role in a scaling fintech/proptech environment

  • Direct impact on financial operations reliability

  • Exposure to finance, product, and engineering collaboration

  • Opportunity to shape processes and internal tooling from early stage

Application deadline: ASAP

Hiring process:

1. Fill in the application form - attach your CV;

2. Have a Zoom interview with Hire5’s Recruiter;

3. Have a Zoom interview with the Dwelly’s representative;

4. Get hired!

title: Lead Go Developer
requirement: Able to clearly justify technical decisions both to engineers and to business stakeholders in simple, business-oriented language.
responsibility: ...senior engineers , ensuring high standards for code quality, resilience, and reliability. Driving improvements in CI/CD pipelines and engineering processes...
description: Andersen is hiring a Lead Go Developer for a project building a scalable distributed platform focused on high performance, reliability, and efficient concurrency for complex business operations. Our customer is a global leader in the insurance and assistance sector, offering a wide range of international solutions across various domains including health, life, travel, and automotive services. The organization is committed to delivering cutting-edge, agile IT solutions while driving digital transformation and sustainability across its operations. The project focuses on building and evolving a high-performance, scalable distributed platform designed to support complex business operations and rapid product growth. The system is developed in Go, with a strong emphasis on efficient concurrency models, reliability, and long-term maintainability. Responsibilities: Designing and evolving scalable distributed systems in Go, choosing appropriate concurrency models and ensuring a balance between performance and maintainability. Collaborating with Product Managers to refine high-level business goals into actionable technical plans and delivery roadmaps. Anticipating and highlighting edge cases, risks, and technical constraints early in the planning phase to avoid issues during implementation. Representing the engineering team in meetings with external stakeholders, explaining technical topics in clear, business-centric terms and challenging unrealistic requirements. Leading and performing code reviews for other senior engineers, ensuring high standards for code quality, resilience, and reliability. Driving improvements in CI/CD pipelines and engineering processes, helping the team ship high-quality code faster and safely. Must-haves: Experience in Golang (design of scalable, distributed backend systems) for 5+ years. Concurrency patterns in Go (goroutines, channels, sync primitives). System design for high performance and maintainability. CI/CD tools and pipelines (e.g. GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, etc.). Senior Go engineer with deep experience designing scalable distributed systems and making conscious architectural trade-offs (concurrency, performance, maintainability). Able to clearly justify technical decisions both to engineers and to business stakeholders in simple, business-oriented language. Comfortable working closely with Product Managers, turning vague business goals into clear technical roadmaps and proactive surfacing edge cases and constraints. Strong personality and confident communicator who can represent the technical team to external stakeholders and push back on unrealistic expectations when needed. Experienced in leading and mentoring other senior engineers, especially through code reviews and technical discussions. Acts as a “force multiplier” in the team by improving CI/CD processes, unblocking technical deadlocks, and raising the overall quality and resilience of delivered code. Level of English – from Upper-Intermediate and above. Reasons why this job would be interesting to you: Andersen cooperates with such companies as Siemens, Johnson & Johnson, AstraZeneca, BNP Paribas, Allianz, Ryanair, TUI, Verivox, Media Markt, etc.. For the past four years, our company has been growing annually by 60–100%, and we constantly involve top-notch specialists in our team. Andersen has mentoring and adaptation systems for new employees, and transparent performance review and assessment systems will allow you to determine your development path and plan your growth. The most important thing that we value in our employees is a commitment to continuous learning. The company supports them in this and gives them access to the best educational platforms, seminars, and practices. In addition, for over 19 years, Andersen has assembled a huge knowledge base and established a robust resource management institution. We have been strengthening our expertise since 2007. During this time, we have formed excellent teams with streamlined processes, where you can learn something new from your colleagues every day and enjoy your work. We are a cool young team of like-minded people communicating informally. You'll have a stable and competitive salary and an extensive benefits package. At Andersen, we have many ways to grow. You can improve as a specialist or a manager, and all your activities will be decently rewarded. Your personal data is protected in accordance with GDPR regulations. Join us!

title: UX Engineer
requirement: Visual Communication: Ability to simplify complex data -heavy workflows into clean, intuitive UI. Collaborative Mindset: Experience working in Agile environments...
responsibility: Collaboration: Work closely with Product Managers, UI Designers, and Software Engineers to define user stories and technical requirements.
description: Mission: We are looking for a UX Engineer to bridge the gap between design and technical implementation. You will be responsible for translating complex requirements into intuitive, elegant, and accessible user interfaces. As a UX Engineer, you aren’t just designing static screens; you are building the interactive experience, ensuring technical feasibility, and maintaining high standards of usability across our digital products. Key Responsibilities: Design & Prototyping: Create high-fidelity wireframes, interactive mockups, and prototypes using Figma, Adobe XD, or Sketch . User Research: Lead and conduct user interviews, surveys, and usability testing to gather insights and validate design decisions. Front-End Integration: Develop and maintain UI components using HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and TypeScript to ensure a seamless handoff to the engineering team. Accessibility & Standards: Ensure all designs and components comply with WCAG accessibility standards and follow responsive design principles. Brand Consistency: Act as a guardian of the corporate design system, ensuring all interfaces align with SLB branding and established design languages. Collaboration: Work closely with Product Managers, UI Designers, and Software Engineers to define user stories and technical requirements. UCD Advocacy: Champion User-Centered Design (UCD) principles throughout the product development lifecycle. Qualifications & Skills: Design Tools: Mastery of Figma (including auto-layout, components, and prototyping). Front-End Development: Strong coding skills in HTML, CSS (SASS/LESS), and JavaScript/TypeScript . UX Research: Proven experience in conducting usability audits and synthesizing user feedback into actionable design improvements. Visual Communication: Ability to simplify complex data-heavy workflows into clean, intuitive UI. Collaborative Mindset: Experience working in Agile environments and using tools like Jira/Confluence. Problem Solving: A portfolio that demonstrates not just "how it looks," but "how it works" and why specific design choices were made. Preferred Qualifications: Experience with front-end frameworks like React or Angular . Understanding of Design Tokens and managing scalable design systems. Familiarity with the energy or technology sector's specific UI/UX challenges. Location: Astana city Employment Type: 5/2 Hybrid (Office + Remote)

Join us!

description: Responsibilities: Maintains comprehensive accounting records for aircraft and spare parts. Ensures timely payments to non-resident suppliers based on submitted primary documents related to the purchase, lease, exchange, and repair of aircraft spare parts. Maintains reconciliation records within assigned responsibilities and ensures accurate reflection of transactions in the company’s accounting system. Manages accounting for aircraft component modernization. Performs depreciation of aircraft components and provision calculation for major overhauls. Records disposal of aircraft components. Maintains lease accounting for engines and APUs (Auxiliary Power Units). Reviews and submits payment documentation for processing. Conducts inventory control and reconciliation of the airline’s assets. Requirements: Knowledge and ability to apply International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS), as well as relevant laws, decrees, regulations, orders, and methodological/normative materials in daily work; Knowledge of tax accounting of fixed assets; Understanding of document flow organization within the accounting process; Advanced Excel skills: proficiency with formulas, tables, handling large data sets efficiently, linking data from multiple sources and reports, and creating pivot tables; Skills in analyzing, reviewing, and adjusting contracts; Experience in interacting with non-resident counterparties; Advanced user of IS ESF (Electronic Invoicing System), including Virtual Warehouse and Accompanying Goods Invoice (SNT) modules; Experienced user of 1C Accounting and ERP systems; Proficient in 1C Enterprise 8.2 / 8.3, and confident user of MS Excel, MS Word, MS PowerPoint, etc. Fluent in Kazakh and Russian; knowledge of English at Intermediate level or higher is preferred.
description_html:
Responsibilities:

  • Maintains comprehensive accounting records for aircraft and spare parts.

  • Ensures timely payments to non-resident suppliers based on submitted primary documents related to the purchase, lease, exchange, and repair of aircraft spare parts.

  • Maintains reconciliation records within assigned responsibilities and ensures accurate reflection of transactions in the company’s accounting system.

  • Manages accounting for aircraft component modernization.

  • Performs depreciation of aircraft components and provision calculation for major overhauls.

  • Records disposal of aircraft components.

  • Maintains lease accounting for engines and APUs (Auxiliary Power Units).

  • Reviews and submits payment documentation for processing.

  • Conducts inventory control and reconciliation of the airline’s assets.

Requirements:

  • Knowledge and ability to apply International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS), as well as relevant laws, decrees, regulations, orders, and methodological/normative materials in daily work;

  • Knowledge of tax accounting of fixed assets;

  • Understanding of document flow organization within the accounting process;

  • Advanced Excel skills: proficiency with formulas, tables, handling large data sets efficiently, linking data from multiple sources and reports, and creating pivot tables;

  • Skills in analyzing, reviewing, and adjusting contracts;

  • Experience in interacting with non-resident counterparties;

  • Advanced user of IS ESF (Electronic Invoicing System), including Virtual Warehouse and Accompanying Goods Invoice (SNT) modules;

  • Experienced user of 1C Accounting and ERP systems;

  • Proficient in 1C Enterprise 8.2 / 8.3, and confident user of MS Excel, MS Word, MS PowerPoint, etc.

  • Fluent in Kazakh and Russian; knowledge of English at Intermediate level or higher is preferred.

You’ll specifically take care of APSYS deployment and assessments but also lead continuous improvement initiatives and training programs. That’s why we don’t expect you to have every single skill. Instead, we’ve listed some that we think will help you succeed and grow in this role: Degree in Engineering, Business, or a related field Experience or understanding of lean principles and continuous improvement methodologies Knowledge of APSYS tools such as 5S, Standard Work, and Value Stream Mapping Familiarity with problem-solving techniques and root-cause analysis A Lean Six Sigma certification Strong facilitation and coordination skills Ability to engage and influence stakeholders at all levels Things you’ll enjoy Join us on a life-long transformative journey – the rail industry is here to stay, so you can grow and develop new skills and experiences throughout your career. You’ll also: Enjoy stability, challenges and a long-term career free from boring daily routines Work with cutting-edge technology Collaborate with transverse teams and helpful colleagues Contribute to innovative projects Utilize our flexible and inclusive working environment Steer your career in whatever direction you choose across functions and countries Benefit from our investment in your development, through award-winning learning Progress towards senior leadership roles or other career paths Benefit from a fair and dynamic reward package that recognizes your performance and potential, plus comprehensive and competitive social coverage (life, medical, pension) You don’t need to be a train enthusiast to thrive with us. key_skills_text: Английский язык, Деловая коммуникация, Continuous Improvement, 5S, Lean manufacturing, TPM, TPS, Kaizen
description_html:
At Alstom, we understand transport networks and what moves people. From high-speed trains, metros, monorails, and trams, to turnkey systems, services, infrastructure, signalling and digital mobility, we offer our diverse customers the broadest portfolio in the industry. Every day, more than 80 000 colleagues lead the way to greener and smarter mobility worldwide, connecting cities as we reduce carbon and replace cars.

Could you be the full-time APSYS Leader in Astana we’re looking for?


Your future role

Take on a new challenge and apply your lean and continuous improvement expertise in a new cutting-edge field. You’ll work alongside collaborative and innovative teammates.

You'll drive meaningful change by enhancing safety, quality, delivery, cost efficiency, and people engagement through standardized, data-driven processes. Day-to-day, you’ll work closely with teams across the business (shopfloor operations, logistics, and cross-functional departments), facilitate improvement initiatives, and much more.

You’ll specifically take care of APSYS deployment and assessments but also lead continuous improvement initiatives and training programs.

We’ll look to you for:

  • Supporting all departments by providing hands-on expertise in APSYS tools such as 5S, Standard Work, Gemba, Value Stream Mapping (VSM), Problem Solving, and fostering a Kaizen mindset

  • Facilitating and coordinating improvement actions to achieve APSYS targets

  • Ensuring regular self-assessment consolidation and preparation for APSYS assessment weeks

  • Serving as the main interface with auditors and the central APSYS team

  • Facilitating APSYS and Kaizen events, workshops, and value stream mapping to identify and address waste and efficiency opportunities

  • Coordinating improvement actions with initiatives leaders, particularly focused on shopfloor and logistics activities

  • Supporting cross-functional teams in problem-solving, root-cause analysis, and performance improvement initiatives

  • Delivering APSYS and Lean training sessions for employees at all levels

  • Promoting a culture of continuous improvement and operational excellence across the organization


All about you

We value passion and attitude over experience. That’s why we don’t expect you to have every single skill. Instead, we’ve listed some that we think will help you succeed and grow in this role:

  • Degree in Engineering, Business, or a related field

  • Experience or understanding of lean principles and continuous improvement methodologies

  • Knowledge of APSYS tools such as 5S, Standard Work, and Value Stream Mapping

  • Familiarity with problem-solving techniques and root-cause analysis

  • A Lean Six Sigma certification

  • Strong facilitation and coordination skills

  • Ability to engage and influence stakeholders at all levels


Things you’ll enjoy Join us on a life-long transformative journey – the rail industry is here to stay, so you can grow and develop new skills and experiences throughout your career. You’ll also:

  • Enjoy stability, challenges and a long-term career free from boring daily routines

  • Work with cutting-edge technology

  • Collaborate with transverse teams and helpful colleagues

  • Contribute to innovative projects

  • Utilize our flexible and inclusive working environment

  • Steer your career in whatever direction you choose across functions and countries

  • Benefit from our investment in your development, through award-winning learning

  • Progress towards senior leadership roles or other career paths

  • Benefit from a fair and dynamic reward package that recognizes your performance and potential, plus comprehensive and competitive social coverage (life, medical, pension)

You don’t need to be a train enthusiast to thrive with us. We guarantee that when you step onto one of our trains with your friends or family, you’ll be proud. If you’re up for the challenge, we’d love to hear from you!

Important to note

As a global business, we’re an equal-opportunity employer that celebrates diversity across the 63 countries we operate in. We’re committed to creating an inclusive workplace for everyone.

Взаимодействие с проектной командой (разработчики, аналитики, менеджеры, devops-инженеры, поддержка) по планируемым релизам, проверка нового продуктового функционала на проде. Проверка функционала по автоматическим отчетам об ошибках. Локализация ошибок и передача баг-репортов в команды разработки. Мониторинг ошибок на production. Требования: Опыт тестирования API(JSON, REST API) и frontend(WEB, mobile), Mobile App(Android,iOs). Понимание процессов QA. Умение находить и читать логи. Опыт работы с Postman, dev-tools (browser), MySQL. Опыт работы с платформами для управления логами(graylog/opensearch/kibana). Опыт тестирования Web, Mobile Web(Опыт тестирования мобильных приложений будет плюсом). Грамотное описание баг-репортов. Условия: График 5/2 c 9.00 до 18.00. Удаленный формат в работы.

Анализирует информацию, полученную на различных этапах производства продукции, показатели качества, характеризующие разрабатываемую и выпускаемую продукцию, и принимает меры по предотвращению выпуска продукции, не соответствующих установленным требованиям. Изучает причины, вызывающие ухудшение качества продукции, выпуск брака, участвует в разработке и внедрении мероприятий по их устранению. Ведет учет и составляет отчетность о деятельности предприятия по управлению качеством продукции. title: Инженер-тестировщик (QA engineer)
requirement: Высшее техническое образование. Разбираться в пользовании электронных устройств. Знание теории тестирования. Знание модели OSI или TCP/IP. Знание клиент-серверной...
responsibility: Разрабатывать план тестирования, методики тестирования для производственного отдела и ОТК (отдел технического контроля). Составлять тестовую документацию: чек-листы, тест-кейсы...
description: NTS Design - мы Казахстанская компания по разработке и производству электронных устройств в сфере безопасности. Мы ищем ответственного тестировщика, способного найти, описать и задокументировать баги и проконтролировать их устранение. В нашей компании тестировщик осуществляет тестирование электронных устройств, которые в последующем серийно изготавливаются. Помимо самих устройств, необходимо тестировать программное обеспечение, предназначенное для настройки этих устройств. Нет опыта в коммерческих проектах? – Не проблема, мы всегда готовы предоставить возможности всем, кто хочет улучшать качество продукта и следить за его развитием. Что предстоит делать: Разрабатывать план тестирования, методики тестирования для производственного отдела и ОТК (отдел технического контроля); Составлять тестовую документацию: чек-листы, тест-кейсы, баг-репорты; Моделировать ситуации, которые могут возникнуть в условиях эксплуатации ПО; Составление отчетов по результатам тестирования; Классифицировать выявленные ошибки и контролировать процесс их ликвидации; Выполнять различные типы тестирования; Поддержка проекта на всех этапах его разработки; Коммуникация с командой разработки для устранения багов; Воспроизведение багов(ошибок) по описанию заказчиков для корректного оформления баг-репорта. Наши ожидания от успешного кандидата: Высшее техническое образование; Разбираться в пользовании электронных устройств; Знание теории тестирования; Знание модели OSI или TCP/IP; Знание клиент-серверной архитектуры; Понимание жизненного цикла разработки ПО и его тестирования(SDLC,STLC); Знание английского языка на уровне чтения технической документации; Умение тестировать Web приложения; Знания о какой либо баг трекинговой системы; Базовые знания в работе баз данных( на уровне простых запросов); Знаком с инструментами по типу Postman или nmap ( будет большим плюсом); Знаком с параметрами определяющими качество и объем цифровой обработки аудио или видео данных (битрейт, дискретизация и т. д). Будет здорово, если у тебя есть: Базовые знания программирования; Базовое владение терминалом Linux(знания базовых команд) ; Умение тестировать Desktop/мобильные и веб приложения; Знания различных видов как функционального так и не функционального тестирования; Знаком с системой управления версиями гит; Был опыт в тестировании мобильных приложений на базе Андроид. Условия работы: Заработная плата 200 000 – 500 000 тенге (исходя из твоих компетенций в рамках работы); Работа над очень интересными проектами, в рамках которых вы сможете продвинуться по карьерной лестнице. Конкурентоспособную заработную плату и повышения по результатам проектов. Возможность профессионального развития, обучения и сертификации за счет компании.
key_skills_text: Функциональное тестирование, Коммуникабельность, Ответственность, Английский язык, QA, Ручное тестирование, Аналитическое мышление, API, Git
description_html:
NTS Design - мы Казахстанская компания по разработке и производству электронных устройств в сфере безопасности.

Мы ищем ответственного тестировщика, способного найти, описать и задокументировать баги и проконтролировать их устранение. В нашей компании тестировщик осуществляет тестирование электронных устройств, которые в последующем серийно изготавливаются. Помимо самих устройств, необходимо тестировать программное обеспечение, предназначенное для настройки этих устройств.

Нет опыта в коммерческих проектах? – Не проблема, мы всегда готовы предоставить возможности всем, кто хочет улучшать качество продукта и следить за его развитием.

Что предстоит делать:

  • Разрабатывать план тестирования, методики тестирования для производственного отдела и ОТК (отдел технического контроля);
  • Составлять тестовую документацию: чек-листы, тест-кейсы, баг-репорты;
  • Моделировать ситуации, которые могут возникнуть в условиях эксплуатации ПО;
  • Составление отчетов по результатам тестирования;
  • Классифицировать выявленные ошибки и контролировать процесс их ликвидации;
  • Выполнять различные типы тестирования;
  • Поддержка проекта на всех этапах его разработки;
  • Коммуникация с командой разработки для устранения багов;
  • Воспроизведение багов(ошибок) по описанию заказчиков для корректного оформления баг-репорта.

Наши ожидания от успешного кандидата:

  • Высшее техническое образование;
  • Разбираться в пользовании электронных устройств;
  • Знание теории тестирования;
  • Знание модели OSI или TCP/IP;
  • Знание клиент-серверной архитектуры;
  • Понимание жизненного цикла разработки ПО и его тестирования(SDLC,STLC);
  • Знание английского языка на уровне чтения технической документации;
  • Умение тестировать Web приложения;
  • Знания о какой либо баг трекинговой системы;
  • Базовые знания в работе баз данных( на уровне простых запросов);
  • Знаком с инструментами по типу Postman или nmap ( будет большим плюсом);
  • Знаком с параметрами определяющими качество и объем цифровой обработки аудио или видео данных (битрейт, дискретизация и т. д).

Будет здорово, если у тебя есть:

  • Базовые знания программирования;
  • Базовое владение терминалом Linux(знания базовых команд) ;
  • Умение тестировать Desktop/мобильные и веб приложения;
  • Знания различных видов как функционального так и не функционального тестирования;
  • Знаком с системой управления версиями гит;
  • Был опыт в тестировании мобильных приложений на базе Андроид.

Условия работы:

  • Заработная плата 200 000 – 500 000 тенге (исходя из твоих компетенций в рамках работы);

  • Работа над очень интересными проектами, в рамках которых вы сможете продвинуться по карьерной лестнице.

  • Конкурентоспособную заработную плату и повышения по результатам проектов.

  • Возможность профессионального развития, обучения и сертификации за счет компании.

title: QA Engineer (Tbilisi)
requirement: Иметь опыт работы в роли UI/UX тестировщика , Usability Analyst или QA Engineer в интерфейсах с опытом не менее 1...
responsibility: Проведение юзабилити-тестирования для выявления проблем в интерфейсах. Тестирование удобства использования мобильных и веб-приложений. Тестирование работы кодов купонов и...
description: HDCart LIMITED – e-commerce компания, которая уже более 5 лет исследует рынки и запускает новые бренды. Мы тщательно изучаем отзывы клиентов о каждом купленном товаре, выявляем слабые стороны и совершенствуем их, повышая качество продукции и удовлетворённость покупателей. Привет! Мы в поисках сотрудника с опытом работы в роли UI/UX тестировщика, Usability Analyst или QA Engineer не менее 1-2 лет . Если вы умеете выявлять и анализировать проблемы в интерфейсах, проводите юзабилити-тестирование, и у вас есть опыт работы с аналитическими инструментами - ждем ваше резюме! Опыт с WordPress/WooCommerce обязателен. description_html:
We are looking for experienced automation engineers who are willing to solve complex technical challenges while building high-quality testing systems using modern technologies.

Requirements:

  • 5+ years of IT experience.
  • Knowledge of testing tools such as Selenium, Appium, GameBench, TestComplete and API automation.
  • Good understanding OOPs languages like Java, C#, or similar languages.
  • Proven ability to design and execute automated tests for RESTful APIs, web applications, and mobile platforms (Appium, XCUITest, Espresso)
  • Strong understanding of CI/CD pipelines and experience with tools like Jenkins, GitHub Actions and similar
  • Knowledge of cloud services (AWS, Google Cloud)
  • Understanding of microservices architecture and related test strategies
  • Eexperience with test management and bug tracking tools (e.g., JIRA, TestRail).
  • Strong problem-solving and communication skills
  • Proactive, self-motivated, and eager to take ownership of tasks
  • Fluent English

Nice to have:

  • Certifications in software testing/automation

  • Exposure to cross-team, multi-project work environments

  • Experience with monitoring and logging tools (New Relic, Prometheus, ELK stack)

We can offer:

  • Projects for such clients as PayPal, Wargaming, Xerox, Philips, adidas and Toyota
  • Competitive compensation that depends on your qualification and skills
  • Career development system with clear skill qualifications

Опыт работы с системами отслеживания задач и дефектов (например Jira или Azure DevOps).

Условия:
  • удаленная работа
